description_long: This is a three-tier industrial-style shelving unit featuring a robust metal frame with visible rivets and cross-bracing for added stability. The shelves are constructed from wood planks with a natural, weathered finish, giving the piece a rustic yet urban appearance. The metal frame is dark and slightly textured, contrasting with the lighter, grainy wood surfaces. Each shelf is open on all sides, allowing for easy access and visibility of stored items. The structure is sturdy and designed to support significant weight, making it suitable for garages, workshops, or urban lofts. There are no doors, handles, or enclosed compartments, emphasizing its utilitarian and accessible design.
description: A sturdy, industrial-style shelving unit with three wooden shelves and a dark metal frame featuring cross-bracing. The open design and weathered wood give it a rustic, urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three wooden shelves and the metal frame with cross-bracing on the sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the prominent X-shaped metal cross-bracing.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the open shelves and metal frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the X-shaped cross-bracing and the layered wooden shelves.
